metadata.description: Modality-based Claude Code skills that recalibrate agents toward compiler-grade craft and scope discipline.

plugins.name: safer
plugins.description: 18 skills (architect, spec, spec-init, spec-migrate, diagnose, docs-reader, dogfood, implement-{junior,senior,staff}, orchestrate, research, review-senior, setup, spike, stamina, ux-audit, verify) plus 14 bin/ utilities. Composes with eslint-plugin-agent-code-guard (lint floor), @chughtapan/safer-spec-development (per-folder living-spec layer), and zapbot (publish).
